meta_title: For Founders: project management to Solve no project ideas (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Project Management for Founders: Solving No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Stop stalling. Learn how to use project management frameworks with Antigravity and Claude Code to turn zero ideas into a revenue-generating SaaS MVP.
content.answer_block: The 'no project ideas' paralysis is a symptom of poor scoping, not lack of creativity. You solve this by implementing an agile project management framework that treats idea generation as a high-frequency sprint. Use Claude Code to automate your backlog and Antigravity to rapidly prototype your winning concepts.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of ambition. You wake up with the fire to build, but the fog of 'what to build' leaves you paralyzed. You aren't lacking talent; you are lacking a system. Most founders fail because they treat idea generation as a lightning strike rather than a repeatable engineering process.

Today, we stop guessing. We are going to treat your 'no ideas' problem like a technical debt bottleneck. By integrating a lean project management framework with modern AI agents like Antigravity and Claude Code, you will transform vague market observations into a structured, executable roadmap that leads directly to your first paying customer.

steps.title: Define Your Niche Parameters
steps.description: Narrow your focus to high-intent B2B problems. Use AI to scan market trends and identify friction points.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a SaaS architect. Generate 5 B2B project ideas based on current 'manual process' pain points in the fintech industry. Format as a project backlog with MVP scope.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Analyze the output from Antigravity and prioritize the top idea based on potential MRR vs development time'.

steps.title: Structure the MVP Backlog
steps.description: Break the chosen idea into a 14-day build sprint. Focus only on the core value proposition.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a project management schema for a 14-day MVP build. Include daily milestones and specific feature flags for user authentication and payment processing.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a project_tasks.md file based on the Antigravity output'.

steps.title: Automated Scaffolding
steps.description: Generate the boilerplate code to remove the friction of starting a new repository.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, scalable Next.js and Supabase boilerplate for the MVP defined in the backlog.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Initialize the project structure and install necessary dependencies based on the generated boilerplate'.

steps.title: Rapid Iteration Loop
steps.description: Use Claude Code to implement features one by one, ensuring each piece is testable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a test-driven development plan for the user authentication flow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the auth flow using Supabase and add unit tests for the login endpoint'.

steps.title: Validation and Deployment
steps.description: Deploy to a staging environment and validate the core flow with a test user.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a deployment checklist for a Vercel-based SaaS launch.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Review the codebase for production readiness and suggest final optimizations before deployment'.

pro_tips: Never build features unless you have a confirmed user waiting for them; use a 'Coming Soon' landing page to validate demand first.
Limit your MVP scope to exactly one core action that solves the user's biggest pain; ignore 'nice-to-have' features.
Treat your project management file like source code; keep it in the root directory and update it daily via Claude Code.
Use AI to write your tests before you write your logic to ensure you aren't over-engineering the solution.
If a feature takes more than 3 days to build, break it into two smaller, independent tasks or cut it entirely.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, immediately set up a feedback loop with your first 10 users to iterate based on real usage data rather than assumptions.
content.conversion_block: Don't let another day pass staring at an empty editor. The market is waiting for your solution, and you have the tools to ship it faster than the competition. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
